title: Trump Officials Seek to Break Editorial ‘Firewall’ at U.S.-Funded News Agencies
author: Minho Kim
fullText: Two federally funded newsrooms received a draft funding agreement that could give President Trump’s appointees the power to veto their new hires for editors in chief and chief executives.
summary: Two federally funded newsrooms received a draft funding agreement that could give President Trump’s appointees the power to veto their new hires for editors in chief and chief executives.
